mapper.insert: insert into agent_enrollment_requests (enrollment_id, claimed_agent_id, tenant_id, agent_name, agent_type, submitted_metadata_json, evidence_json, fingerprint, remote_address, status, submitted_at, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, review_comment, created_at, updated_at) values (#{enrollment.enrollmentId}, #{enrollment.claimedAgentId}, #{enrollment.tenantId}, #{enrollment.agentName}, #{enrollment.agentType}, coalesce(cast(#{enrollment.submittedMetadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{enrollment.evidenceJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{enrollment.fingerprint}, #{enrollment.remoteAddress}, #{enrollment.status}, #{enrollment.submittedAt}, #{enrollment.reviewedBy}, #{enrollment.reviewedAt}, #{enrollment.reviewComment}, #{enrollment.createdAt}, #{enrollment.updatedAt}) on conflict (enrollment_id) do update set claimed_agent_id = excluded.claimed_agent_id, tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, agent_name = excluded.agent_name, agent_type = excluded.agent_type, submitted_metadata_json = excluded.submitted_metadata_json, evidence_json = excluded.evidence_json, fingerprint = excluded.fingerprint, remote_address = excluded.remote_address, status = excluded.status, submitted_at = excluded.submitted_at, reviewed_by = excluded.reviewed_by, reviewed_at = excluded.reviewed_at, review_comment = excluded.review_comment, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: select * from agent_enrollment_requests where claimed_agent_id = #{claimedAgentId} order by case status when 'PENDING_REVIEW' then 1 when 'REGISTERED' then 2 when 'APPROVED' then 3 when 'REJECTED' then 4 else 9 end, updated_at desc nulls last, submitted_at desc nulls last limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into agent_profiles (agent_id, tenant_id, agent_name, agent_type, owner_team, description, approval_status, enabled, risk_status, policy_version, created_at, updated_at) values (#{profile.agentId}, #{profile.tenantId}, #{profile.agentName}, #{profile.agentType}, #{profile.ownerTeam}, #{profile.description}, #{profile.approvalStatus}, #{profile.enabled}, #{profile.riskStatus}, #{profile.policyVersion}, #{profile.createdAt}, #{profile.updatedAt}) on conflict (agent_id) do update set tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, agent_name = excluded.agent_name, agent_type = excluded.agent_type, owner_team = excluded.owner_team, description = excluded.description, approval_status = excluded.approval_status, enabled = excluded.enabled, risk_status = excluded.risk_status, policy_version = excluded.policy_version, updated_at = excluded.updated_at

insert into agent_credentials (credential_id, agent_id, credential_type, public_key_fingerprint, token_hash, credential_version, issued_at, expires_at, revoked_at, revoked_reason, created_at, updated_at) values (#{credential.credentialId}, #{credential.agentId}, #{credential.credentialType}, #{credential.publicKeyFingerprint}, #{credential.tokenHash}, #{credential.credentialVersion}, #{credential.issuedAt}, #{credential.expiresAt}, #{credential.revokedAt}, #{credential.revokedReason}, #{credential.createdAt}, #{credential.updatedAt})
mapper.select: select * from agent_credentials where agent_id = #{agentId} and token_hash = #{tokenHash} and revoked_at is null and (expires_at is null or expires_at >= #{now}) order by credential_version desc limit 1

select * from agent_credentials where agent_id = #{agentId} and public_key_fingerprint = #{publicKeyFingerprint} and revoked_at is null and (expires_at is null or expires_at >= #{now}) order by credential_version desc limit 1
select * from agent_credentials where agent_id = #{agentId} order by revoked_at nulls first, credential_version desc, issued_at desc nulls last limit 1
mapper.update: update agent_credentials set revoked_at = #{revokedAt}, revoked_reason = #{reason}, updated_at = #{revokedAt} where agent_id = #{agentId} and revoked_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into agent_capabilities (agent_id, capability_code, capability_version, enabled, approved_by, approved_at) values (#{capability.agentId}, #{capability.capabilityCode}, #{capability.capabilityVersion}, #{capability.enabled}, #{capability.approvedBy}, #{capability.approvedAt}) on conflict (agent_id, capability_code) do update set capability_version = excluded.capability_version, enabled = excluded.enabled, approved_by = excluded.approved_by, approved_at = excluded.approved_at
mapper.select: select * from agent_capabilities where agent_id = #{agentId} and enabled = true order by capability_code
mapper.insert: insert into agent_authorization_scopes (scope_id, agent_id, tenant_id, system_code, site_code, event_type, task_type, data_classification_limit, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values (#{scope.scopeId}, #{scope.agentId}, #{scope.tenantId}, #{scope.systemCode}, #{scope.siteCode}, #{scope.eventType}, #{scope.taskType}, #{scope.dataClassificationLimit}, #{scope.enabled}, #{scope.createdAt}, #{scope.updatedAt})
mapper.select: select * from agent_authorization_scopes where agent_id = #{agentId} and enabled = true order by tenant_id, system_code, task_type
mapper.insert: insert into agent_approval_audit (audit_id, agent_id, enrollment_id, action, old_status, new_status, operator_id, reason, created_at) values (#{audit.auditId}, #{audit.agentId}, #{audit.enrollmentId}, #{audit.action}, #{audit.oldStatus}, #{audit.newStatus}, #{audit.operatorId}, #{audit.reason}, #{audit.createdAt})

insert into agent_security_events (security_event_id, gateway_node_id, claimed_agent_id, agent_id, event_type, reason, fingerprint, remote_address, metadata_json, occurred_at, created_at) values (#{event.securityEventId}, #{event.gatewayNodeId}, #{event.claimedAgentId}, #{event.agentId}, #{event.eventType}, #{event.reason}, #{event.fingerprint}, #{event.remoteAddress}, coalesce(cast(#{event.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{event.occurredAt}, #{event.createdAt})

insert into agent_security_enforcement_policies (policy_id, agent_id, enabled, duplicate_runtime_mode, require_credential_rotation, notify_email, notify_slack, notify_siem, email_recipients_json, slack_channels_json, siem_topics_json, metadata_json, updated_by, created_at, updated_at) values (#{policy.policyId}, #{policy.agentId}, #{policy.enabled}, #{policy.duplicateRuntimeMode}, #{policy.requireCredentialRotation}, #{policy.notifyEmail}, #{policy.notifySlack}, #{policy.notifySiem}, coalesce(cast(#{policy.emailRecipientsJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{policy.slackChannelsJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{policy.siemTopicsJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{policy.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{policy.updatedBy}, #{policy.createdAt}, #{policy.updatedAt}) on conflict (agent_id) do update set enabled = excluded.enabled, duplicate_runtime_mode = excluded.duplicate_runtime_mode, require_credential_rotation = excluded.require_credential_rotation, notify_email = excluded.notify_email, notify_slack = excluded.notify_slack, notify_siem = excluded.notify_siem, email_recipients_json = excluded.email_recipients_json, slack_channels_json = excluded.slack_channels_json, siem_topics_json = excluded.siem_topics_json, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: select * from agent_security_enforcement_policies order by updated_at desc nulls last limit #{limit}

select 'agent_profiles' as table_name, count(*)::bigint as row_count, 'Core AgentGovernanceService' as expected_writer, 'No governed Agent profile has been approved or created.' as empty_meaning from agent_profiles union all select 'agent_enrollment_requests', count(*)::bigint, 'Core authorization/enrollment API', 'No Agent has attempted enrollment or runtime authorization yet.' from agent_enrollment_requests union all select 'agent_credentials', count(*)::bigint, 'Core approve/re-approve flow', 'Approved Agents are not connectable until credential material is issued.' from agent_credentials union all select 'agent_capabilities', count(*)::bigint, 'Core approve/update profile flow and Flyway V23/V24 backfill', 'Dispatch governance cannot match Agent capabilities until populated.' from agent_capabilities union all select 'agent_authorization_scopes', count(*)::bigint, 'Core approve/update profile flow and Flyway V23/V24 backfill', 'Dispatch governance has no allowed tenant/system/task scopes.' from agent_authorization_scopes union all select 'agent_approval_audit', count(*)::bigint, 'Core governance state transitions', 'No governance decision or profile edit has occurred.' from agent_approval_audit union all select 'agent_security_events', count(*)::bigint, 'Core authorize-connection/security-event API', 'No connection authorization attempt has reached Core yet.' from agent_security_events union all select 'agent_security_enforcement_policies', count(*)::bigint, 'Core security policy API', 'No per-Agent duplicate-runtime security enforcement policy has been configured.' from agent_security_enforcement_policies union all select 'agents', count(*)::bigint, 'Netty core-directory-sync -> Core AgentDirectoryService', 'No Netty runtime Agent has been synced to Core. Check GATEWAY_CORE_DIRECTORY_SYNC_ENABLED and Core internal token.' from agents
